FormattingIssue.title: FormattingIssue
FormattingIssue.description: A layout or formatting issue flagged during ATS parsing

severity.description: The severity classification of the formatting issue

ContentRecommendation.title: ContentRecommendation
ContentRecommendation.description: Content-specific recommendation to improve candidate experience alignment

section.description: The resume section this recommendation pertains to

recommendation.description: Corrective phrasing or context to insert

impact.description: Predicted impact of making this fix on keyword indexing algorithms

AnalysisResponse.title: AnalysisResponse
AnalysisResponse.description: Full compiler outcome payload representing the optimized matching score

atsScore.description: Numeric ATS matching score between 0 and 100

atsTier.description: Verbal tier matching (e.g. Strong Match, Weak Match)

roleAlignment.description: Parsed candidate focus role or title analyzed

matchedKeywords.description: Keywords extracted successfully from the candidate text

missingKeywords.description: Required target job keywords not detected in candidate text

formattingScore.description: Score from 0 to 100 for document structure and layout parsing safety

formattingIssues.description: Layout violations or non-standard characters found

formattingTips.description: High-level guidelines for cleaning document margins and structures

contentRecommendations.description: Specific resume upgrades to improve candidate narrative impact

keywordTips.description: Integration tips to add missing keywords organically

alignmentSummary.description: A descriptive executive recruiter review of candidate alignment

AnalysisHistoryItem.title: AnalysisHistoryItem
AnalysisHistoryItem.description: A single resume audit log item stored inside a history timeline

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp indicating when this analysis was completed

targetRole.description: Role aligning parsed resume document to industry

atsScore.description: Main score mapped in audit indexing

report.description: The detailed audit feedback response from Gemini model

userId.description: The owner user ID who compiled the report

/users/{userId}/history/{historyId}.description: Secure subcollection syncing a user's unique resume audit history item records
